summary: Updated the single-page homepage to remove the motivation and differentiation sections, add Schedule, Submissions, and Contact sections with placeholder copy, and align in-page navigation with the revised section set.
work_completed: Edited `index.html` to remove the `Why This Workshop, and Why Now?` and `What Makes This Different` sections.
Added new `Schedule`, `Submissions`, and `Contact` sections in `index.html` using placeholder text that avoids unconfirmed logistics, URLs, or contact details.
Updated the homepage navigation anchors to target `Overview`, `Scope`, `Schedule`, `Submissions`, and `Contact`.
Adjusted `assets/main.css` navigation cell width from 25% to 20% so the five-link navigation renders cleanly.

findings.message: No automated test suite changes were needed for this static content update.
Basic verification was limited to checking that the new navigation anchors and section IDs are present and that removed section IDs no longer appear.

Docs likely need updating: `docs/product-specs/workshop-website.md` still describes motivation and differentiation content as current behavior and lists schedule/submissions/contact as future follow-ups.

follow_up_recommendations: Update the website spec to reflect the new homepage section structure once documentation work is in scope.
Replace the placeholder schedule, submission, and contact copy when confirmed logistics and links are available.
